{{Infobox location
| name = Spirit Well
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Spirit Well Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Spirit Well is a large, sky-blue body of water that resembles a pond more than a traditional well. It is significantly larger than the [[Dream Well]] and serves as a powerful source of spiritual nourishment. The water within it tastes like sweet spring water but possesses intense energy capable of shocking a spirit into action, directly nourishing the soul and causing [[madra]] to rush through its channels. Its primary functions include stimulating soul growth, facilitating recovery, and increasing the density of [[madra]]. For workers or practitioners, consuming even a small amount can provide a massive boost, potentially bringing a [[Highgold]] to the verge of advancement. Due to its immense potency and value, it is considered extremely expensive, with a single cup costing a fortune. The well's energy can also be used to revitalize other constructs, such as the [[Heaven's Drop]], by increasing their brightness and power.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Resembling a pond that is at least ten times the size of the [[Dream Well]], the Spirit Well is an endless spring of power with water as blue as a summer sky. This destination serves as a training site for [[Lindon]] and offers miraculous properties that aid advancement, increase [[madra]] density, and promote soul growth. While a single sip can restore [[madra]] and even guide the power of [[Orthos]], a single cup costs a fortune. Although the well failed to work for [[Ziel]] during his journey toward it, the oracle was successfully raised to [[Truegold]] thanks to its influence.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Spirit Well]] is blue as a summer sky.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Spirit Well]] promotes growth in the soul and increases [[madra]] density.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Spirit Well]] is a destination that can restore [[madra]] with a single sip.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Spirit Well]] is a location that [[Ziel]] headed towards.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Spirit Well]] is at least ten times bigger than the [[Dream Well]] and resembles a pond.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Spirit Well]] is described as an endless spring of power.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Spirit Well]] is a location where [[Lindon]] trains.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Spirit Well water]] has miraculous properties that aid advancement.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Spirit Well]] failed to work for [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A single cup from the [[Spirit Well]] cost a fortune.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Spirit Well]] contains water that guides [[Orthos]]' power.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The oracle was raised to [[Truegold]] thanks to his [[Spirit Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has cycled the power of the [[Spirit Well]] to [[Dross]] before.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
